title: Totem of Rick Astley 🎤
description: This is a simple resourcepack that replaces the totem with Rick Astley (animation + music).        :D
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1O0y0pHC/images/da795c8fddb51708e1c0592f09b2a51632dd9bb7.gif)
![downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fapi.modrinth.com%2Fv2%2Fproject%2Ftotem-of-rick-astley&query=downloads&suffix=%20downloads&style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=10DD10&logoSize=auto&label=Modrinth%20Downloads&labelColor=101010&color=242424)

This is a resourcepack with "totem_of_undying" replaced with Rick Astley. Animation with a resolution of 196x196 pixels, which consists of ~28 frames. When used, a piece of music "Rick Astley - Never Gonna Give You Up" is triggered. There is also a translation of the item "Rick Astley".
